textByHash.08f30efe722748f245b988f4f68386f25b35d85e: Don't say that around here too loud please, it may catch and then I'd be out of business.
textByHash.1527ad6487d9b14439eb2020fb3922404b4b1887: Well since you gave the two gangs a good kicking, business has really taken off! Both gangs are spending all their gold here drowning their sorrows.
textByHash.16f026fd6e3230eb7723c5d19dd2cee8147c1159: I did think about calling it 'Ali's', but then it'd get confused with the Camel Shop, the Kebab House, the Mayor's residence...
textByHash.16f88b775def3190d08a02a2b9325ab6e508b6ee: They're paying customers, so I won't rock the boat if you don't mind.
textByHash.340b64a1a909da31b5ae78594de2e9f2f4ac9948: He was just here! Look, he's even left his drink on the table by those barrels. Must have nipped out to go to the toilet.
textByHash.374ed12c73c5b537d24be634ba318fe6b6067233: Yes! All my uncles are called Ali!
textByHash.3846bc7b9a012cd117323ff22501c2a14321df8e: Nothing much really. About what you'd expect from a sleepy little town like ours.
textByHash.4a105d96f61c36415041a91ca49a78f7443fd295: He might be gone a while though. The nearest outhouse is all the way over on Fossil Island.
textByHash.5819a34b3d420fa0e1fcc7959100b948daff24f7: You might be onto something there, but then what would I do with the drunken sailor?
textByHash.6f70fd94911a67b619d005b111064717fea2411a: That's a difficult question to answer. I don't know anyone else's uncles.
textByHash.869dd55e4431d340cd15bc289defaa39a0fe9904: Fine, suit yourself. There's no need to insult me.
textByHash.8dd9d168b96d167db2aed1fc2b2adfcdb640e7d2: Maybe around these parts. Were you expecting it to have 'Ali' in the name?
textByHash.c186e96373104e821529717f5f7838b8ad823702: Good day. Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.d68b647fa1e41e9ba6a2f1ea2cf4a56606e5d3a1: What?! Poisoned drinks, in my bar?! My reputation would be destroyed if someone died here. Thank you adventurer.
textByHash.dd1ac18a4b99cce6a6894102c0ba01494760d32b: Well, I'm called Ali and I'm from here. Are you looking for me?
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.e16daca2a3d947565ea99db7523ddd648359cb36: Here, have a beer - it's on the house.
textByHash.e1adbd983df763c97f20004584c28e3bc1ae55e9: Get out of here, you cheeky rascal. A cut of my profits? As if!
textByHash.eb4d1440e173968ef773d93cc63e93eb3e59f6e4: Drunken Ali. Oh never mind it's a long story.
